name: Frog Bard
text: You may play this card from your hand as an Infinite equip magic card to your primary creature. The equipped creature gains this card's Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier. If that creature is removed from the field, return this card to your hand.

effects.actionText: Move or return a card between zones
